title: Document Classification for E-Discovery
scenario: Develop a prompt to classify a large corpus of legal documents into three categories: contracts, invoices, and witness statements. The classification should be based on specific keywords and header patterns within each document. Assume the documents are in plain text format and contain a mix of formal and informal language. The target LLM output should be a Python list with three sublists containing the classified documents.
constraints: Must use a Python-based classification library such as scikit-learn
Must include a brief explanation of the classification approach used

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the prompt satisfies the constraints provided
Verify the accuracy of the classification results using a testing dataset
Assess the clarity and conciseness of the prompt's explanation
